prestazioni: Engine: FB20D (2.0L DOHC AVCS naturally aspirated) forced induction via Garrett GT2860RS turbocharger (0.63 A/R turbine housing, 52mm compressor wheel) with custom 3-inch stainless steel turbo-back exhaust featuring a Tomei 80mm titanium muffler and unequal-length headers by Killer B Motorsport for optimized scavenging and torque response

Fuel System: Injector Dynamics ID1050x fuel injectors paired with a Radium Engineering dual-catch can setup and a Cobb Tuning Accessport (Subaru FB20D Stage 2+ aggressive map) with custom ethanol flex-fuel tuning via EcuTek RaceROM for 93 octane and E85 blends, supported by a Walbro 450 LPH in-tank fuel pump and a PTP stainless steel fuel rail

Suspension & Drivetrain: Ohlins Road & Track DFV coilovers (custom valved for the Crosstrek Wilderness chassis) with 25mm front and 20mm rear Whiteline adjustable sway bars, Cusco 2-way LSD (28-spline, 1.5-way preload), and a Perrin Performance 75mm aluminum short shifter with spherical bushings for reduced throw and improved engagement
estetica: Aero: Seibon Carbon CS-Type front lip spoiler (Crosstrek Wilderness-specific fitment) with a custom 3D-printed carbon fiber rear diffuser by Rocket Bunny (Subaru XV/Crosstrek overfender kit, bolt-on, no cutting required) and a Maxton Design GT-style carbon fiber roof spoiler for reduced lift at speed

Lighting: Diode Dynamics SL1 LED pod lights (amber fog delete, 50W CREE LEDs) integrated into the Wilderness front bumper with a Morimoto XB LED headlight conversion (3000K color temperature, adaptive DRLs) and a custom rear light setup featuring LUX H8 LED reverse lights and sequential turn signals via VLEDS

Exterior & Protection: Rally Armor UR mud flaps (Subaru Crosstrek Wilderness-specific, red lettering) with a custom PPF (XPEL Ultimate Plus) full front-end wrap including the hood, fenders, and mirrors, paired with a JDM Subaru STI-style carbon fiber hood scoop (functional, ducted to the airbox) and a custom roof rack by Front Runner Outfitters (slimline, modular, 300lb load capacity)
